articles.title: US to announce deal allowing Saudi Arabia a nuclear programme
articles.summary: The agreement would fulfil a long-held Saudi ambition but could attract concern in Israel and from some US lawmakers.

articles.title: Trump threatens to target Iran's bridges and power plants if Hormuz attacks persist

articles.title: Modelling scout linked to Epstein found dead in Paris
